description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Tests on OSX that runs on push, pull request, and workflow dispatch events. Use a macos-latest job with a matrix strategy to test multiple Python versions, Boost interfaces, and Capstone versions. The workflow checks out the repository, sets up Python, installs LLVM, Clang, dependencies, Z3, GMP, Bitwuzla, Capstone, Unicorn, and LIEF, compiles Triton, and runs unittests.
